overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing first-person night driving through a rain-soaked neon-lit dystopian city. The player navigates through urban streets, covered underpasses, and elevated highways while encountering sparse traffic and police presence.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy urban residential street with palm trees and crosswalks

events.description: green sports car passes in opposite direction on the left

agents.ego_description: driving through rain-soaked city streets at moderate speed, navigating around crosswalks and road debris

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining both sides of the wet street
white and red painted crosswalk lines on the asphalt
tall street lamps illuminating the rainy street
distant neon signs glowing through the rain haze
construction barriers with blue and red stripes

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a vehicle driving through a rain-soaked urban street at night. Palm trees line the road while neon signs glow faintly through the heavy rain. A green sports car passes in the opposite direction as the vehicle navigates over crosswalk markings and around debris on the wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street corner with storefronts and pedestrians

events.description: turns right at intersection into commercial area with neon storefronts
slows down while passing pedestrians walking on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: turning right at intersection and driving past commercial buildings with bright neon signage

notable_agents.action: pedestrians walking on sidewalk near the green commercial building

entered.detail: green facade commercial building with large windows
well-maintained hedge row along the sidewalk
bright neon signs for storefronts illuminating the street
dark entrance to a covered underpass or parking structure
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti art

segments.scene_description: The vehicle turns right at an intersection into a commercial area featuring a distinctive green building and neon storefront signs. Pedestrians walk along the sidewalk as the car slows down, approaching the dark entrance of a covered underpass. The transition from residential to commercial is marked by increased neon lighting and the presence of pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered parking underpass with police presence and neon billboards

events.description: enters covered underpass with concrete walls and pink neon lighting
passes close to large concrete pillar on the right side

agents.ego_description: driving slowly through the covered underpass, observing the parked police vehicle and neon-lit walls

notable_agents.action: NCPD police car parked under the overpass with officers standing nearby

entered.detail: concrete ceiling of the covered underpass
large support pillars for the overpass structure
large pink neon billboard on the left wall
blue neon billboard illuminating the concrete wall
extensive graffiti covering the concrete walls

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a covered underpass where the rain stops and neon lighting takes over. Pink and blue neon billboards illuminate graffiti-covered concrete walls while an NCPD police car sits parked to the right. The space feels enclosed and sheltering compared to the open rainy streets, with large support pillars lining the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection near gas station with traffic

events.description: exits underpass back to open street with yellow gas station visible
begins following yellow sedan through city intersections

agents.ego_description: accelerating through city streets while following a yellow sedan ahead through multiple intersections

notable_agents.action: yellow sedan driving ahead through intersections, acting as lead vehicle

entered.detail: distinctive yellow gas station structure with flat roof
orange sports car parked near the gas station
striped awning over commercial storefront
ramp leading to elevated highway
elevated highway overpass ahead

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the scene opens to reveal a yellow gas station on the right and an orange sports car parked nearby. The vehicle accelerates to follow a yellow sedan ahead through city intersections. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk along the sidewalks as the car approaches an elevated highway ramp.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with concrete barriers and overpasses

events.description: merges onto elevated highway with concrete barriers on both sides
passes under overpass causing brief shadow across the windshield

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed on elevated highway, maintaining distance from the yellow car ahead

notable_agents.action: yellow sedan continuing at high speed on the highway ahead

entered.detail: concrete safety barriers lining the left side of the highway
concrete safety barriers lining the right side of the highway
large advertising billboard structure beside the highway
distant city lights and skyscrapers visible through the rain
concrete lane dividers on the highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle merges onto an elevated highway flanked by concrete barriers, accelerating to high speed while following the yellow sedan. The road is enclosed by safety barriers on both sides with occasional overpasses creating brief shadows. Distant city lights glow through the rainy night ahead as the car maintains a steady pace on the wet highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway approach to city center with large billboards

events.description: rain intensity increases slightly reducing forward visibility
slows down approaching highway intersection with traffic lights

agents.ego_description: cruising toward the city center on the highway, reducing speed for the upcoming intersection

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard beside the highway
dense cluster of skyscrapers and high-rise buildings ahead
buildings with bright neon lighting visible in the distance
road markings indicating upcoming intersection

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle cruising toward the city center with large billboards visible on the left and a dense skyline of neon-lit skyscrapers ahead. The rain intensifies slightly as the car slows down approaching a highway intersection. The concrete barriers recede into the distance while the distant city lights grow larger through the rainy windshield.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-soaked dystopian city that transitions from neon-lit urban streets into an enclosed underpass and finally onto a high-speed elevated highway. It begins by navigating wet asphalt lined with palm trees and glowing signs, passing a green sports car before turning into a commercial district filled with pedestrians and vibrant storefronts. As the vehicle enters a covered underpass, the rain ceases and the environment shifts to an enclosed concrete corridor illuminated by pink and blue neon billboards and graffiti. The scene then opens back into the rain upon exiting the tunnel, passing a yellow gas station and following a sedan toward an ascending ramp. Finally, the camera accelerates onto an elevated highway flanked by concrete barriers, cruising toward a dense skyline of towering neon skyscrapers as the city lights grow larger through the rainy windshield.
